title: Fictional
description: A mod born in Fictional that fixes some bugs in other mods
body:
This mod can fix some errors caused by other mods to prevent the game from crashing or freezing.

Installing this mod will not change the game's content; It only fixes those bugs. You can install this mod even if you haven't installed the mods that have bugs.

For example, NPE exceptions resulting from cataclysm.

For specific fix details, please see below.

This mod will fix some bugs of some mods when you install it (more are being updated) :

1. Fix bug of ba_bt: jungle tower generation error.

2. Fix bug of cataclysm: NPE cause of laser beam projectile .

3. Fix bug of mutant monsters(v8.0.7): mutant zombies disappear when they die from fire.

4. Fix bug of mutant more: icicle spike cause of NPE when saving data.

5. Fix bug of mutant more: wandering trader block the thread because the map of it structure.
